nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Brief readme explaining the rustdoc documentation setup for RisingWave, pointing to the index page and custom CSS override file.

nodes.name: index.md
nodes.summary: Landing page for RisingWave developer documentation, indexing links to design docs, crate API docs for core components (stream, batch, frontend, storage, meta, connector, common, utils).

nodes.name: rust.css
nodes.summary: Custom CSS stylesheet for the RisingWave rustdoc pages, overriding default rustdoc styles to match project branding and improve readability.
